title: Tweaked Hay Block
description: Changes the hay block's texture to match the wheat's colors, simple like that
body:
A simple resource pack that tweaks the hay block's colors so it matches the wheat texture.

![pack preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd0c9e1fca6706e8d37cbf1ff79b03451f00a6f9.png)
